productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Popart Flip Black Dandelion Flip Flop
description: Look stylish in these pop art flip flops from puma. With comfortable straps and a cushioned footbed, it looks great when teamed with cargoes and tees for laid back days.Upper Synthetic twill lace straps with a cushioned upper and a toe separator for absolute comfort and durability Midsole EVA footbed with art for style and cushioned comfort Outsole TPR outsole for durability Circular suction lugs throughout the footbed with curved forefoot for cushioned comfort and style shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
